name: Plum Sauce B1
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Bring to boil over medium heat.
3. Cook, stirring constantly for 5 minutes, until all ingredients are well blended.
4. Remove from heat and let cool.
5. To preserve, pour into hot sterilized jar and seal at once.
Temperature: HOT
Effort: EASY
